# thirdParty/ — external reference files (NOT Choupo-curated, NOT redistributed)

Files here are third-party originals kept LOCALLY as import sources for
curation tools (`bin/import_nasa.py --thermo ...`).  They keep their own
licences/terms and are NOT part of the Choupo distribution — this folder
is gitignored except for this README.

| file | what | source | terms |
|---|---|---|---|
| chemsep/ | ChemSep pure-component databank (xml/pcd) for bin/curate/chemsep_to_choupo.py | user-provided from a ChemSep install (see chemsep/README.md) | Artistic-2.0 (databank); data gitignored, only README/NOTICE tracked |
| BURCAT.THR | Extended Third Millennium Ideal Gas Thermochemical Database (NASA-7), with ATcT updates; ~3500 species | Goos, Burcat & Ruscic, via the ReSpecTh mirror (https://respecth.elte.hu/burcat.php), downloaded 2026-07-02 | free for scientific use with citation; not redistributed here |

`BURCAT-INDEX.txt` (generated by `bin/curate/burcat_index.py`, gitignored)
is the browsable view: one line per importable card with MW and dHf_298.

Species IMPORTED from these files become Choupo `.dat` entries in
`data/standards/components/` with per-species citation — the imported
VALUES are cited facts; the bulk file itself stays out of the repo.
